channel.title: Security Fundamentals on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Security Fundamentals on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Security Fundamentals
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Security" , "Access Control Lists" , "VPN" , "Layer 2 Security" , "Cisco Certification" , "Wireless Security" , "AAA" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master security fundamentals for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn security concepts, device access control, VPNs, access control lists, Layer 2 security, AAA, and wireless security.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the SY0-701 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Cybersecurity Certification" , "Security Fundamentals" , "Threat Analysis" , "Security Architecture" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Risk Management" , "Incident Response" , "Security Operations"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701) study course covering all five exam domains: general security concepts, threats and vulnerabilities, security architecture, security operations, and security program management.
